= Contents =
    - [[#usage|usage]]
        - [[#usage#add line after response|add line after response]]
        - [[#usage#POST with json data|POST with json data]]

= usage =

== add line after response ==
`-w "\n"`

== POST with json data ==

required options: ::
* `--header "Content-Type: application/json"`
* `--header "X-CSRFtoken: <token>"`
* `--referer "<base_url>"`
* `--cookie "<cookie>"`
* `--data "{<json>}"`
